description: An Antiphony audio post — the single canonical content record. Mirrors app.bsky.feed.post's field structure (so it's legible to atproto tooling), differing only in the NSID, the audio embed, and an optional title. A post with `reply` is a reply; without `reply` it is a prompt (root post). `title` is an optional prompt feature, NOT the discriminator.

main.description: A prompt (no `reply`) or a reply (has `reply`). The audio lives in `embed` as a dev.antiphony.embed.audio.

text.description: USER-authored text (bsky-semantic). The prompt's typed question/description, or an optional reply caption. May be empty for pure-audio posts. NEVER the transcript — that lives in the audio embed.

title.description: Optional short headline. A prompt feature; replies omit it. Its presence is NOT the prompt/reply discriminator (that is `reply` presence).

embed.description: Post attachment. Audio posts carry dev.antiphony.embed.audio. Never wrap your own audio/records as an external card (the one path to recursive rendering).

reply.description: Present iff this post is a reply. Its presence discriminates reply-vs-prompt. Carries StrongRef root + parent for portable, content-addressed threading.

langs.description: BCP-47 language tags for the post text.

labels.description: Author-applied self-labels (content warnings). User input, so it stays on the record; service moderation is the labeler layer, not a field here.

replyRef.description: StrongRef threading pointers. `root` = the prompt at the top of the thread; `parent` = the post being directly answered (the prompt, or another reply). Replaces the legacy flat promptId.
